opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My nose won't stop bleeding no matter how hard I pinch it, and I take warfarin every single day.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It's been bleeding for about three-quarters of an hour and simple first aid hasn't worked. I'm on blood thinners for my heart valve and I'm frightened it won't stop.

symptom_narrative.onset: about an hour ago, out of the blue
symptom_narrative.character: a heavy nosebleed that keeps dripping and soaking tissues
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst nosebleed I've ever had
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: pinching slows it a bit but it starts oozing again as soon as I let go
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: no vomiting of blood, no black stools, no blood in my urine that I've noticed
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: occasional small nosebleeds in the past that always stopped quickly
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: sitting down applying pressure, quite distressed by the amount of blood

past_medical_history.how_managed: on warfarin (a blood thinner) every day and I get regular blood tests for it

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: antibiotic tablets for a urine infection, started three days ago

social_history_volunteered.alcohol: an occasional glass of wine, nothing recently
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: older adult at home, spouse present and helping

objective_data_offered.value: holding a blood-soaked towel to the front of the nose, bloodstains on clothing, looks anxious and distressed
spouse says the bleeding has soaked through several tissues and a towel over about the last 45 minutes
says the nose is still slowly oozing even while pinching it
